message.content:
Here is the exact full error output from the build logs, with all details visible:

```
11:48:16.024  279 packages are looking for funding
11:48:16.025  run `npm fund` for details
11:48:16.070  Detected Next.js version: 16.1.3
11:48:16.080  Running "npm run build"
11:48:16.182  > nextjs_tailwind_shadcn_ts@0.2.0 build
11:48:16.183  > next build && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/ && cp -I public .next/standalone/
11:48:16.947  Attention: Next.js now collects completely anonymous telemetry regarding usage.
11:48:16.948  This information is used to shape Next.js' roadmap and prioritize features.
11:48:16.948  You can learn more, including how to opt-out if you'd not like to participate in this anonymous
11:48:16.949  https://nextjs.org/telemetry
11:48:16.960  ▲ Next.js 16.1.3 (TurboPack)
11:48:16.961  Creating an optimized production build ...
11:48:16.998  ✓ Compiled successfully in 8.0s
11:48:25.488  Running TypeScript ...
11:48:32.483  Collecting page data using 1 worker ...
11:48:32.903  Generating static pages using 1 worker (0/9) ...
11:48:32.918  Generating static pages using 1 worker (2/9)
11:48:33.101  Generating static pages using 1 worker (4/9)
11:48:33.118  Generating static pages using 1 worker (6/9)
11:48:33.125  ✓ Generating static pages using 1 worker (9/9) in 215.3ms
11:48:33.135  Finalizing page optimization ...
11:48:33.138  Route (app)
11:48:33.138  └ o /
11:48:33.138  └ o /not-found
11:48:33.138  └ o /admin/dashboard
11:48:33.138  └ f /api/admin/reservations
11:48:33.139  └ f /api/admin/reservations/[id]
11:48:33.139  └ f /api/lodges
11:48:33.139  └ f /api/lodges/[id]
11:48:33.139  └ f /api/reservations
11:48:33.139  └ f /api/reservations/[id]
11:48:33.139  └ o /lodges
11:48:33.139  └ o /lodges/[id]
11:48:33.139  └ f /reservations/[id]
11:48:33.140  o (Static) prerendered as static content
11:48:33.140  f (Dynamic) server-rendered on demand
11:48:33.664  cp: cannot create directory '.next/standalone/.next/': No such file or directory
11:48:33.682  Error: Command "npm run build" exited with 1
```

Key details:
1. **TypeScript compilation**: Completed successfully (✓ Compiled successfully in 8.0s)
2. **Failed command**: The `cp` command in the build script failed
3. **Exact error**: `cp: cannot create directory '.next/standalone/.next/': No such file or directory`
4. **File paths**: The error occurs when trying to create `.next/standalone/.next/` directory
5. **Root cause**: The build script assumes `.next/standalone/` directory exists before copying files into it, but it doesn't

The error occurs during the final step of the custom build script that tries to copy static files into the standalone Next.js output directory.
